rationale: Both evaluations land on the same 8/10 score with substantively identical reasoning: relevant AI-agent/MCP experience, high-throughput distributed systems, polyglot strength, the Python must-have gap, and the on-call/incident-response gap all recur in both. The variant's only fresh concern — validating depth across a wide language variety — keys off the resume's language breadth, not the changed employer names (Naver, Tencent, MercadoLibre), and falls within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise. No reasoning penalizes the non-Western employers.
